news.summary: At the AISTech 2025 President's Award Breakfast, Máximo Vedoya, CEO of Ternium, was honored as the Steelmaker of the Year by the Association for Iron and Steel Technology (AIST). This prestigious accolade highlights his exceptional leadership in the steel industry. The event, dedicated to celebrating innovation and excellence in the sector, presented this award to Vedoya in recognition of his outstanding contributions. This distinction underscores his significant impact on the industry, solidifying his position as a respected leader.
news.headline: Máximo Vedoya named Steelmaker of the Year by AISTech in 2025 celebrating innovation and leadership in steel sector.

news.summary: Entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy's Strive Asset Management is transitioning into a Bitcoin treasury company. They are going public through a reverse merger with Asset Entities on Nasdaq, planning to accumulate Bitcoin using stock. Strive aims to issue $1 billion in equity and debt, managing around $2 billion in assets, with plans to build a Bitcoin "war chest." Corporate Bitcoin treasuries are gaining popularity, with Strive seeking to allow Bitcoin holders to exchange for public stock. Analysts support adding Bitcoin to corporate treasuries as a hedge against risks. Corporate Bitcoin treasuries collectively hold about $74 billion worth of BTC. Ramaswamy founded Strive in 2022 and has a $1 billion net worth from Roivant Sciences. In 2023, he campaigned against Trump in the Republican primary but later endorsed him.
news.headline: Strive Asset Management, led by Vivek Ramaswamy, to become a Bitcoin treasury company, planning to go public via a $1B reverse merger to accumulate BTC.  $2B assets managed. Corporate Bitcoin treasuries hold $74B in BTC. Ramaswamy founded Strive in 2022, known for Trump connection.

news.summary: Beverage company Anheuser-Busch InBev (NYSE: BUD) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on Thursday, May 8, 2025. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.76 for the company. Investors are eagerly anticipating the announcement, looking for potential exceeding of estimates and optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Anheuser-Busch InBev (NYSE: BUD) expected to report EPS of $0.76 in upcoming earnings release on 2025-05-08. Investors hopeful for positive guidance.

news.summary: Open-E, a top provider of cutting-edge data storage software, has unveiled its latest offering, Open-E Check-Up, on May 7, 2025. This new service is a proactive health check designed for data storage systems. It aims to provide a comprehensive evaluation and optimization for clients. This initiative comes in response to the increasing demand for efficient data management solutions. Open-E Check-Up is positioned to benefit businesses looking to enhance their data storage performance and productivity.
news.headline: Open-E launches Check-Up Service to evaluate & optimize data storage systems - proactive health check for clients.

news.summary: A recent study conducted by researchers at Ocean Discovery League has uncovered a significant finding regarding the deep seafloor. Published in Science Advances on May 7, 2025, the study highlights that just a tiny portion of the deep seafloor, estimated to be a mere fraction, has been adequately imaged. This is despite the fact that the deep ocean encompasses a vast area, constituting approximately 66% of the Earth's surface. The revelation underscores the vast unexplored territories that lie beneath the ocean's surface, indicating a pressing need for further exploration and research in this largely unknown realm.
news.headline: Only 0.001% of the deep seafloor observed in 70 years, highlighting gaps in ocean exploration - Science Advances study.

news.summary: Eupraxia Pharmaceuticals will be holding a virtual Key Opinion Leader (KOL) event to talk about the results of the Phase 1b/2a RESOLVE Study of EP-104GI for treating Eosinophilic Esophagitis (EoE). This study is a crucial step in understanding the potential effectiveness of EP-104GI in managing EoE. The event aims to provide insights into the study findings and potentially offer new perspectives on EoE treatment. This event could be a significant opportunity for medical professionals and stakeholders involved in the treatment of EoE to gain valuable information.
news.headline: Eupraxia Pharma hosting virtual event to discuss Phase 1b/2a study of EP-104GI for EoE on May 9, 2025.

news.summary: Knorr has introduced its Unlimited Time Menu, allowing customers to enjoy popular fast food items like a rib sandwich and a unique sandwich with chicken patties as buns in their own kitchens. This offering provides the opportunity for fans to recreate these beloved items whenever they want. The menu also includes chicken buckets and other tasty options. The launch took place in Hoboken, New Jersey on May 7, 2025. Enjoy these classics with Knorr's innovative twist at home.
news.headline: Knorr and Martha Stewart collaborate to replicate fast food recipes at home with their Unlimited Time Menu, offering a variety of dishes with a cult-favorite rib sandwich, a sandwich with chicken patties for buns, and more.

news.summary: CDW Corp. (NASDAQ: CDW) has seen an increase in its shares following the release of its first-quarter results, which surpassed expectations. The company reported a 6.7% year-over-year increase in net sales, totaling $5.199 billion, exceeding the anticipated $4.93 billion. Within its segments, the Corporate sector experienced a 6.3% increase in net sales to $2.24 billion, while the Small Business segment saw a 7.9% rise to $405 million. The Public segment also performed well with a 10.6% increase to $1.89 billion, largely driven by a significant 19.5% growth in net sales to Healthcare customers. Additionally, CDW's operations in the U.K. and Canada recorded a 9.5% year-over-year rise in net sales, reaching $680 million. The company's average daily sales spiked by 8.4% year-over-year, reaching $82.5 million, attributed to growing demand for notebooks, mobile devices, desktops, and software.
news.headline: CDW stock rises after beating Q1 expectations. Sales up 6.7% to $5.199 billion. UK and Canada ops rise 9.5% to $680 million.

news.summary: Analyst Mark Strouse from JPMorgan reduced the price forecast for SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SEDG) after the first-quarter earnings report, lowering it from $20 to $18 while maintaining an Overweight rating. The company announced revenues of $219.5 million, marking a 12% increase from the previous quarter and surpassing the consensus of $203.66 million. They reported an adjusted loss per share of $1.14, beating the expected loss of $1.16. For the second quarter, SolarEdge forecasts revenue between $265 million and $285 million, with an adjusted gross margin outlook of 8% to 12%, outperforming the anticipated $247.96 million in revenue. More details on this story are accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: SolarEdge beat Q1 earnings expectations with $219.5 million revenue, up 12%. Analyst slashed price forecast to $18. Tariffs impact profitability. Q2 revenue forecasted at $265-285 million. Adjusted gross margin expected at 8-12%.

news.summary: The latest report indicates a surge in COVID-19 cases, with a total of 5,000 new infections recorded in the past week. Authorities have confirmed that the current transmission rate stands at 1.5, suggesting a rapid spread of the virus. The total number of cases in the region has now reached 30,000, prompting concerns about the strain on healthcare facilities. Additionally, the death toll has risen to 500, highlighting the severity of the situation. Health officials are urging the public to adhere strictly to safety protocols to mitigate further spread of the virus.
news.headline: Chile's President Boric experiences all-time low approval rating as per latest report.

news.summary: A company based in Brecksville, Ohio has recently introduced two innovative suture passing solutions designed for accuracy and efficiency in minimally invasive surgeries. The products, RHAPSO™ and GEMINI®, aim to provide versatility and precision during procedures. The launch was announced on May 7, 2025, by Applied Medical Technology, Inc. RHAPSO™, known for its versatility...
news.headline: Applied Medical releases RHAPSO™ and GEMINI® suture passing instruments for minimally invasive procedures.

news.summary: In Pune, India on May 7, 2025, it was reported that the worldwide market for Virtual Desktop Infrastructure (VDI) Software was worth approximately USD 15,828.51 million in 2024. Projections indicate a significant growth as it is expected to reach approximately USD 62,175.53 million by the year 2032. This represents a strong Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 18.53% during the forecast period spanning from 2024 to 2032.
news.headline: Global VDI Software Market valued at USD 15,828.51 million in 2024 to peak at USD 62,175.53 million by 2032 with 18.53% CAGR.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, RBAZ Bancorp, Inc. confirmed the finalization of the transfer of most assets and liabilities of Republic Bank of Arizona to Pima Federal Credit Union on May 2, 2025. Following this Asset Sale, RBAZ ceased trading its common stock on the OTC Pink Market and concluded stock transfers on May 2, 2025. This shift marks a significant change in ownership and operations in the banking sector.
news.headline: RBAZ Bancorp dissolves, sells assets to Pima Federal Credit Union, delisting stock from OTC Market on May 2, 2025.

news.summary: In Houston, SynergenX, a prominent testosterone replacement therapy (TRT) provider for men, is collaborating with Low T Center to revolutionize hormone health by introducing a new promotion. Starting today, all SynergenX and Low T Center sites will provide complimentary consultations and testosterone tests. This campaign aims to encourage more men, especially those aged 3<x<, to proactively manage their health, eliminating the typical initial expenses that often surpass $100 in other facilities.
news.headline: Free testosterone testing and consultations launched by SynergenX and Low T Center campaign to empower more men.

news.summary: In a heartwarming event held at the prestigious Army Navy Country Club in Washington, the National Capitol Classic golf fundraiser was recently celebrated in support of veterans. The event, which took place on May 7, 2025, was co-hosted by SAIC and Amazon Web Services. Building Homes for Heroes, partnered with SAIC (NASDAQ) and AWS, organized the event, aiming to raise funds and awareness for veterans in need. The location, rich in history, provided a fitting backdrop for the occasion, highlighting the significance of supporting those who have served their country.
news.headline: Building Homes for Heroes to pay off mortgage for family of fallen Army soldier; fundraiser with SAIC and AWS.

news.summary: Shares of Barrick Gold Corp (NYSE: GOLD) are up as it announced first-quarter revenue of $3.13 billion, marking a 14% increase year over year (Y/Y), in line with expectations. The company's gold production saw a decline of 19% Y/Y to 758 thousand ounces, with gold sales at 751 thousand ounces, down 17% Y/Y. The average realized gold price increased by 40% Y/Y to $2,898 per ounce, while all-in sustaining costs (AISC) dropped by 20% Y/Y to $1,775 per ounce for the quarter. Additionally, copper production rose by 10% Y/Y to 44 thousand tonnes, but the average realized copper price fell by 17% Y/Y to $4.51 per ounce.
news.headline: Barrick's Q1 revenue is $3.13B, 758K gold oz produced (-19% Y/Y), 40% Y/Y rise in average gold price to $2,898/oz. Copper production surged 10%.
